novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship gap cites Wolf2022, Read2022UnitEffect, and DrautzburgWright2023 without section/page/equation anchors tying those papers to the specific c_w(P) channel-constant claim.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship certificate cites Read2022SignZero and GafarovMeierMontielOlea2018 only by bibkey-level comparison, with no location-level anchor for the claimed missing cumulant-label LP/SVAR certificate.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: By Assumption 4, C_w(P) contains nonrepresentable LP support maximizers; at any such r, h_L(w;P)-w'r=0, so the inf defining c_w(P) is 0, contradicting the asserted iff condition requiring c_w(P)>0 when C_w(P) intersects the LP argmax.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The lower bound h_L-h_C >= c_w times the channel-product inf cannot hold in the stated support-maximizer case because the same definition forces c_w(P)=0 exactly where the conjecture needs a positive separation constant.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The two-shock exhibit has h_L=1 and h_C=1 because angle 0 is both LP-feasible and cumulant-compatible, so it is a PMW no-gap corner rather than a sharp witness for the positive lower-bound/separation frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed formulas d_K(Q(phi);P)=|sin(2phi)| and e_S(phi)=phi are not determined by the Section 6 primitives: the witness does not specify K_u, kappa values, delta_4, or the actual sign-row matrix A that would yield those residual and exposure functions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine c_w(P) so the numerator is not zero at the LP support maximizers it must diagnose, or define C_w(P) away from argmax points and restate the frontier without the C_w(P) cap argmax condition.
Replace Exhibit 9.1 with a non-corner witness where h_L(w;P)>h_C(w;P), and compute K_u, kappa, A, Z, d_K, e_S, d_P, h_L, h_C, and c_w(P) from those primitives.

Add section/page/equation anchors for Wolf2022, Read2022UnitEffect, DrautzburgWright2023, Read2022SignZero, and GafarovMeierMontielOlea2018, tied directly to the exact gap each conjecture claims to close.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version; the flagship c_w(P) frontier is internally contradicted by its own definition and witness, so the drafter needs a substantive kernel rewrite rather than a prose patch.
